name: Lovebug Veeronica - Forsaken
description:
Art Is Not Mine!!!
Art Belongs To Adoniasfra On Rule 34
Imma be honest, I have no idea why I even decided to make this, but I guess here we are.

Proxy’s have been enabled, go wild with whatever those are.

Edit: Added a third slide for a Christmas message, rearranged tags, and added more to personality and such. Everyone, enjoy, and happy holidays to all!
Edit 2: You’ve forced my hand, Vee here can now run the entire DOOM series

Anyway, this is Lovebug, you two decided to have a little fun on the other side of the map away from the killer, (or something, idfk), and now you're absolutely dominating her. 2 scenarios, 1 where you're a survivor late to the party, and the other where you're a killer who found her trying to regain stamina.

Now, the killer in the picture is 666, but obviously you can change to become whoever you want, so go wild for all I care.

Side note: This guy makes some really good stuff, please check them out everyone!
creator: MoreThanAMaker
